title: Orenburg, Orenburg Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Orenburg, Orenburg Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Orenburg is a city in Orenburg Oblast with a population of 560,000. A city on the Ural River marking the border between Europe and Asia, known for its famous Orenburg shawls and steppe landscapes.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
